Milan & Deepa · Vivah 2026 Together July 7, 2026  ·  Butwal, Nepal
Our Story
Two Families

Two Roots,
One Sacred Tree

Groom मिलन खनाल Milan Khanal खनाल परिवार Devdaha, Rupandehi · Nepal
&
Together
Bride दीपा कोइराला Deepa Koirala कोइराला परिवार Syangja, Gandaki · Nepal

One family raised Milan in the warmth of Devdaha's plains. Another raised Deepa among the green hills of Syangja. For years, two separate stories were being written — and neither family knew they were writing the same ending. Today, those stories become one.

Your Significance

Dear,

Valued Guest

A wedding without its witnesses is merely a ceremony —
with you, it becomes a memory that breathes forever.

01🕯️You Are Our Witness

In our tradition, a marriage lives in the hearts of those who witness it. You make our vows real, sacred, and eternal.

02🏔️You Carry Our Blessings

Like the Himalayas standing firm — your presence and prayers are the foundation of our new beginning.

03🌺You Complete the Picture

Your smile, your warmth — you are a colour in our memory. Without you, something is missing.

04🎊You Witness History

You'll watch the Saptapadi — seven steps for seven lifetimes. Not everyone gets this moment. You do.

ॐ

ॐ द्यौः शान्तिरन्तरिक्षं शान्तिः।
पृथिवी शान्तिरापः शान्तिः।
ओषधयः शान्तिर्वनस्पतयः शान्तिः।
विश्वे देवाः शान्तिर्ब्रह्म शान्तिः।

Some moments in life are too beautiful to witness alone.
This is ours — and we want you to be part of it.

Your laughter, your blessings, your presence —
they are the greatest gift you could bring us.

With love and gratitude,
we are saving a seat just for you.

🪷🪔🏔️🪔🪷
With love,
Milan & Deepa
Khanal Family · Koirala Family
July 6–8, 2026 · Butwal & Devdaha · Nepal 🙏
